series_metadata.series_description: The evaluations are completed by Field Services representatives annually and becomes part of the field audit report. The evaluation contains the name of the deputy registrar, city, county, agency number, date, summary of evaluation, comments, recommendations, special problems, and the field representatives name. DISTRIBUTION: Original - Field Services District Office, Copy - Deputy Registrar.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in active files for three years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
